# Copilot Instructions

This repo builds a test harness for the Nomad Autoscaler.

## How to orient yourself

1. Read [`plan.md`](../plan.md) — the design brief. It defines the system components, their responsibilities, and invariants. Read this before anything else.

2. Read [`copilot-plan.md`](../copilot-plan.md) — the execution plan. It describes the work phases, dependencies between them, and lists the available work streams.

3. To see what can be worked on, look at the spec files under [`specs/`](../specs/). Each file is a self-contained work item.

## What to do

After reading the above, you should be able to answer: **"What are the available work streams and which ones are ready to start?"**

From there, ask the user which spec to work on, or work on the one they indicate.
